title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at ProSport Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at ProSport Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ProSport Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ProSport Ventures Solutions:
ProSport Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport Ventures Solutions!
